title: Verify existing implementation of password strength validator
description: The password strength validator already exists in `src/auth/password-validator.ts` with the required implementation (8+ chars, uppercase, lowercase, number validation) and comprehensive tests in `src/auth/password-validator.test.ts`. All 12 tests pass.

src/auth/auth-service.ts - Password validation via pbkdf2 algorithm
vitest unit testing pattern with `describe`/`it` blocks
